hero.badge: AL TARIQ AL LAMIAA GROUP — LIBYA
hero.title: Your Trusted Partner for Automotive Care in Libya
hero.subtitle: Production · Importation · Distribution

pillars.productionDesc: Local production of high-quality automotive care products.
pillars.importationDesc: Sourcing and importing premium brands for our local market.
pillars.representationDesc: Acting as the exclusive distributor for global automotive leaders.

products.washDesc: Professional washing solutions that turn every station into a premium service center. Active foam, touchless systems, tire care — engineered for Libya's busiest operators.
products.fluidsDesc: G12, G13, Glaceol-type coolants built for Libya's demanding heat. OEM-grade protection, engineered for the road conditions your clients face every day.
products.protectionDesc: Waxes, ceramic coatings, paint films, glass treatments. Professional-grade products that make every vehicle shine — and keep it that way.

brands.title: The Official Bridge Between Global Leaders and Libya
brands.becomePartner: Are you a global brand? Become our exclusive Libyan partner →

production.pricingDesc: Stable, accessible prices for the Libyan market.
production.jobsDesc: Skilled manufacturing jobs built in Libya.
production.hubDesc: Serving the wider North African region.

distributor.label: FOR INTERNATIONAL BRANDS
distributor.title: Your Gateway to Libya
distributor.desc: Are you a global automotive care brand looking to enter the Libyan market? AL LAMIAA offers exclusive distribution agreements, full market coverage, and a Group with a decade of automotive expertise across Libya.

contact.text: Are you a petrol station operator, garage owner, retailer, or an international brand looking for an exclusive partner in Libya? We would be glad to hear from you.
